name: Metric Card
purpose: Single KPI tile for market figures such as price, market cap, PE, and fact counts.

structures.name: Basic Metric
structures.notes: Tabular-numeral value with a quiet uppercase label.

structures.name: Metric with Trend
structures.notes: Trailing delta chip uses chart-2 for gains and destructive for losses.

structures.name: Metric with Sparkline
structures.notes: Inline sparkline drawn from chart tokens for at-a-glance direction.

interactionNotes: Numbers always use tabular-nums; never color the value itself, only the delta.
Gain/loss must include sign and arrow so meaning is not color-only.
